# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      setup_command:
        description: 'Command to run for environment setup (e.g., install dependencies)'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No setup command specified"'
        type: string
      build_command:
        description: 'Command to run for the build process'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No build command specified"'
        type: string
      test_command:
        description: 'Command to run for testing'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No test command specified"'
        type: string
      post_build_command:
        description: 'Command to run after build and test (e.g., packaging, cleanup)'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No post-build command specified"'
        type: string
      runner:
        description: 'The runner environment to use'
        required: false
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'
        type: choice
        options:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - ubuntu-22.04
          - windows-latest
          - macos-latest
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for all commands'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      artifact_name:
        description: 'Name of the artifact to upload (leave empty to skip upload)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      artifact_path:
        description: 'Path of files to upload as artifact'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string

jobs:
  custom-build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner }}
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Print build configuration
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  Custom Build Pipeline Configuration"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Runner:             ${{ inputs.runner }}"
          echo "Working Directory:  ${{ inputs.working_directory }}"
          echo "Setup Command:      ${{ inputs.setup_command }}"
          echo "Build Command:      ${{ inputs.build_command }}"
          echo "Test Command:       ${{ inputs.test_command }}"
          echo "Post-Build Command: ${{ inputs.post_build_command }}"
          echo "Artifact Name:      ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}"
          echo "Artifact Path:      ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}"
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Setup
        run: |
          echo ">>> Running setup command..."
          ${{ inputs.setup_command }}
          echo ">>> Setup completed."

      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo ">>> Running build command..."
          ${{ inputs.build_command }}
          echo ">>> Build completed."

      - name: Test
        run: |
          echo ">>> Running test command..."
          ${{ inputs.test_command }}
          echo ">>> Tests completed."

      - name: Post-Build
        run: |
          echo ">>> Running post-build command..."
          ${{ inputs.post_build_command }}
          echo ">>> Post-build completed."

      - name: Upload Artifacts
        if: ${{ inputs.artifact_name != '' && inputs.artifact_path != '' }}
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}
          retention-days: 14

      - name: Build Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  Build Summary"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Build completed on runner: ${{ inputs.runner }}"
          echo "Working directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}"
          echo "Status: ${{ job.status }}"
          echo "============================================"
